visual_standard.priority: approved reference library first, no invented style
visual_standard.line_style: black or dark gray line art on white or transparent background
visual_standard.camera: true top-down 2D gameplay sprite, with side and back views only as production turnaround references
avoid: new improvised style that ignores the reference library

male_resident.notes: Adult male proportions, realistic top-down, clean linework, no face-forward angle.

female_resident.notes: Adult female proportions, realistic top-down, clean linework, no face-forward angle.

dog.notes: Natural companion dog anatomy, white dog readable in black linework, no toy or cute cartoon body.

runtime_fallback_status.status: procedural line-art fallback only, to be replaced by approved PNG atlases once available
runtime_fallback_status.current_support: quantized eight-direction facing, idle and walk motion timing
